1.title: Many more rewards
1.description: Get 25 extra packs and 5 extra tournament tickets during the season.

2.title: More games per day
2.description: Play 6 Jokers games per day instead of 3, with 1 game recharging every 4 hours instead of 8.

3.title: Tradable rewards
3.description: All the rewards you get are tradeable with other players in the external marketplace.

facts.2-description-2: Every game recovers every 4 hours intead of 8.

intro.summary: How do I charge up XP?
intro.popup-title: How XP powers your season run

points.1: Daily missions on Home pay XP and reset every day. Each mission shows exactly how much XP is on the line.
points.2: Clearing levels each day also grants XP. The first clear of the day pays more than the second, and the payout keeps tapering after that.
points.3: The higher the level you clear, the bigger the XP payout.
points.4: XP is the fuel for the season track on this screen. Stack enough of it to unlock packs with season cards and tournament entries for the season finale, where the biggest prizes drop.

learn-more.question: What's XP and what is it for?
learn-more.popup-title: How mission XP moves your season forward

points.1: Every mission you complete grants XP instantly. Daily missions reset every day and weekly missions give you bigger chunks of progress.
points.2: That XP fills your Season Progression track, so missions are one of the main ways to move the bar forward.
points.3: As your XP bar climbs, you unlock rewards like packs, tournament entries, and other season progression prizes.
points.4: If you want to progress faster, keep an eye on both daily and weekly missions and clear them consistently.

shop-tier-unlocked.description: {{item}} items of {{rarity}} rarity are now available in the shop.

unlockable-descriptions.modifiers_c: Modifiers are already unlocked from the start.
unlockable-descriptions.specials_c: Special cards are the engine of each run, with global effects that can reshape hands, shops, and game flow.
unlockable-descriptions.traditionals: Traditional cards are now available in shops, so you can shape your deck card by card.
unlockable-descriptions.modifiers_ba: New modifiers with higher rarity and stronger effects are now available.
unlockable-descriptions.powerups_cb: Consumables that grant extra points or multiplier when you need a quick boost.
unlockable-descriptions.slot_2: You can now buy up to 2 special card slots in shops.
unlockable-descriptions.levelups: Level up your favorite hands to increase their power across rounds.
unlockable-descriptions.specials_b: More powerful, higher-rarity special cards are now unlocked.
unlockable-descriptions.slot_3: You can now buy up to 3 special card slots in shops.
unlockable-descriptions.lootboxes: Loot boxes open into surprise rewards with valuable content for your collection.
unlockable-descriptions.neon: Neon cards work like traditional cards to build hands, but they are stronger. Play a hand made entirely of Neon cards to boost their power even more.
unlockable-descriptions.specials_a: Higher-rarity special cards with stronger effects are now available.
unlockable-descriptions.powerups_as: Higher-rarity power-ups bring stronger effects for key round swings.
unlockable-descriptions.slot_4: You can now buy up to 4 special card slots in shops.
unlockable-descriptions.specials_s: The rarest and most powerful special cards are now unlocked.
unlockable-descriptions.slot_5: You can now buy up to 5 special card slots in shops.
unlockable-descriptions.slot_6: You can now buy up to 6 special card slots in shops.
unlockable-descriptions.burn: The burn card lets you remove cards from your deck to refine strategy.
unlockable-descriptions.play_4: From now on, each run starts with 4 plays.
unlockable-descriptions.play_5: From now on, each run starts with 5 plays.
unlockable-descriptions.discard_4: From now on, each run starts with 4 discards.
unlockable-descriptions.discard_5: From now on, each run starts with 5 discards.
unlockable-descriptions.slot_7: You can now buy up to 7 special card slots in shops.

intro.summary: Each season brings a new set of exclusive special cards. Unlock them from packs to use them in game and track them here.

points.1: Each season adds new special cards that are only available for that season.
points.2: You unlock cards by obtaining them from packs.
points.3: Packs unlock as you earn XP by completing daily missions and passing levels each day.
points.4: Once a special card is in your collection, it is unlocked inside the game.
